title: bromus porteri var. havardii
intro: Bromus porteri var. havardii, also known as Havard's Brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass native to North America, and its medicinal properties lie in its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Havard's Brome include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Bromus porteri var. havardii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive well-being and calm stomach discomfort.
